base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of red_slime_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Red Slime (She-Slime in NA localization) — slightly stronger palette-swap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red Slime (She-Slime in NA localization) — slightly stronger palette-swap; surrounding fields same HP class
